chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-371 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 02-04-2019. Muhammad Sachal R. Awan, Advocate for Respondent No.3. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl: Advocate General a/w ASI Muhammad Salim of PS Badin. = Mr. Ali Khan Leghari, Advocate while holding brief for Mr. Dilbar Khan Leghari, counsel for the petitioners, intimates that latter is out of station and requests for a short date. ASI Muhammad Salim of PS Badin is present and submits that the subject F.I.R has been disposed of under ‘C’ class. The attendance of the official respondents are dispensed with until directed otherwise. Adjourned to 09.05.2019. JUDGE JUDGE *Fahad Memon*
